Header TS verifie. Branche runtime via `Touch_Item`/dispatch `g_items.ts`; integration `apps/web` indirecte via synchro inventaire/configstrings du gameplay local; `renderer-three` non specifique attendu, les sorties visibles passent par les entites refresh MD2 generiques et le HUD client. Tests: `npm run verify:g-items`, `npm run verify:p-weapon`. |

Header TS verifie. Branche depuis `g_items.ts`, `g_cmds.ts` et demo web via `local-game-bootstrap.ts`; renderer-three non applicable. Tests: `npm run verify:g-items`, `npm run verify:p-weapon`, sonde directe `Use_Weapon`. |

Header TS mis a jour. Branche runtime via `Cmd_Drop_f`/`Cmd_InvDrop_f` et dispatch `g_cmds.ts`; `apps/web` indirect via commandes client forwardees au runtime; `renderer-three` consomme seulement l'entite item visible issue de `Drop_Item`. Tests: `npm run verify:p-weapon`, `npm run verify:g-items`, `npm run typecheck`, sonde directe `Drop_Weapon` normal/current/DF_WEAPONS_STAY. |
| `Quake-2-master/game/g_items.c` | function | `Weapon_Blaster` | `packages/game/src/g_items.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/p_weapon.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/local-game-bootstrap.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/g_spawn.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/g_combat.ts`<br>`packages/game/src/index.ts` | `Weapon_Blaster` | Valide | A redecouper | Corps original compare dans `game/p_weapon.c`; `g_items.c` declare la fonction et l'entree `weapon_blaster` de `itemlist`. Table TS alignee (`weaponThink`, view model, icone, flags, precaches). Header TS verifie. Runtime branche via `Think_Weapon` depuis `ClientThink`/`ClientBeginServerFrame` et via `local-game-bootstrap.ts`; `apps/web` consomme ce flux par le runtime local/commandes, sans logique parallele; `renderer-three` consomme les sorties visibles generiques (bolt `EF_BLASTER`, temp/muzzle effects, dlights/trails via client refresh), pas de branchement dedie requis. Tests: `npm run verify:g-items`, `npm run verify:p-weapon`, `npm run verify:full-game:three-renderer`, sonde directe `Weapon_Blaster` solo/deathmatch; `npm run verify:full-game:gameplay` bloque sur import absent `packages/client/src/main.js`. |
